description: Words that must NEVER appear in user-facing explanations
notes: These words are alarming, technical, or inappropriate for awareness framing

alarming.description: Alarming language that causes unnecessary anxiety

technical.notes: AG-PROMPT-SURFACE-PROBABILISTIC-LANGUAGE-017: 'pattern' removed - common in everyday language ('weather patterns', 'behavior patterns')

dlpStyle.description: DLP-style blocking language (we are NOT DLP)
